UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores public profile information for a user in the VibeShare application. Authentication is handled externally (Firebase), so no authentication-sensitive data is stored here.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

username.description: A unique, public-facing username for the user.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short biographical description of the user.

followerIds.description: An array of UserProfile IDs that follow this user. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N UserProfile - Followers)

followingIds.description: An array of UserProfile IDs that this user is following. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N UserProfile - Following)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

MediaPost.title: MediaPost
MediaPost.description: Represents a single piece of shared media (photo, video, or audio) by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MediaPost entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who posted the media. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N MediaPost)

mediaUrl.description: URL to the actual media file.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to a thumbnail image for video or audio media.

caption.description: User-provided text description for the media post.

hashtags.description: An array of hashtags associated with the post.

aiSuggestedCaption.description: AI-generated caption suggestion for the media post.

aiSuggestedHashtags.description: AI-generated hashtag suggestions for the media post.

location.description: Optional geographical location associated with the post.

isPrivate.description: Indicates if the media post is private (true) or public (false).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the media post was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the media post was last updated.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a comment made by a user on a specific media post.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Comment entity.

mediaPostId.description: Reference to the MediaPost the comment belongs to. (Relationship: MediaPost 1:N Comment)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who made the comment. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Comment)

text.description: The textual content of the comment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was last updated.

Like.title: Like
Like.description: Represents a user's 'like' or 'reaction' to a media post.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Like entity.

mediaPostId.description: Reference to the MediaPost that was liked. (Relationship: MediaPost 1:N Like)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who liked the post. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Like)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the like was created.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: Represents a private chat conversation between two or more users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Conversation entity.

participantIds.description: An array of UserProfile IDs involved in this conversation. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N Conversation)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was initiated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was last updated (e.g., by a new message).

lastMessageId.description: Reference to the ID of the last message in this conversation for quick access. (Relationship: Conversation 1:1 ChatMessage - last message)

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single text message within a chat conversation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

conversationId.description: Reference to the Conversation this message belongs to. (Relationship: Conversation 1:N ChatMessage)

senderId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who sent this message. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ChatMessage)

text.description: The textual content of the message.

sentAt.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

isRead.description: Indicates if the message has been read by the recipient(s).

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public profile information for a user. The document ID (`userId`) MUST match the Firebase Authentication UID. Access: readable by all authenticated users, writable only by the profile owner (`request.auth.uid`).

/public_posts/{postId}.description: Contains media posts explicitly marked as public (`isPrivate: false`). Readable by all authenticated users. Writable/deletable by the post's `userId` field.

/users/{userId}/private_posts/{postId}.description: Contains media posts explicitly marked as private (`isPrivate: true`). Readable, writable, and deletable only by the `userId` in the path.

/public_posts/{postId}/comments/{comment.description: Comments on public media posts. Readable by all authenticated users. Writable by any authenticated user.

/users/{userId}/private_posts/{postId}/c.description: Comments on private media posts. Accessible only by the post owner.

/conversations/{conversationId}.description: Represents a private chat conversation. Accessible only to participants.
